Cerence Stock Jumps After Inking Pact With AI Giant Nvidia
data.description: Cerence stock jumps 39.7% premarket after announcing an expanded collaboration with NVIDIA to enhance its CaLLM language models for automotive AI.

data.title: Hedge Fund Giant Dan Loeb's PG&E Bet Beats Market
data.description: Billionaire Dan Loeb's top stock holdings have performed well in the second half of 2024, with Pacific Gas & Electric Co. and Bath & Body Works, Inc. showing growth. PG&E's expected EPS growth and recent equity raise make it a promising investment, while BBWI has also seen an increase in share price and exceeded earnings expectations.
